Name: Minimum time for 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' compared to 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Minimum time between 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Time between 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and the final event ('Payment Handled' or 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE')
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time it takes for a case to reach 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' after being 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and resubmitted
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time from 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' to 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SAVED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER'

Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER and the end of the case

Name: Average time from 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' to 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time it takes 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' to be done in variants where 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' eventually occurs

Name: Time between 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' in the fastest variant

Name: Average waiting time for 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' after 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time of 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' when the resource is 'SYSTEM' compared to when the resource is 'STAFF MEMBER'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and the end of case grouped by the last value of org:resource

Name: Average time from 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' to the next activity in the case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time for 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' compared to minimum time for 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time between 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Minimum time between 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER' and 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'
